name: @dk/jolly
description: Saleor project bootstrapper and agent configurator

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=node --external yargs --external dotenv && bun build src/cli/bootstrap.ts --outdir=dist --target=node --external yargs --external dotenv && bun build src/cli/agent.ts --outdir=dist --target=node --external yargs --external dotenv
